analyticsTeaser.title: See where your money moves
analyticsTeaser.subtitle: Track income, expenses and profit over any range — daily, weekly, monthly or yearly — with clear breakdowns by client and category.

install.iosBody: Tap the Share icon, then choose “Add to Home Screen”.

meta.title: ProfitSync — Know your profit. Sync your business.
meta.description: Whether it's your business or your personal finances, ProfitSync brings your income, expenses, and cash flow into one clean workspace — so you always know exactly where your money stands.

hero.subtitle: Whether it's your business or your personal finances, ProfitSync brings your income, expenses, and cash flow into one clean workspace — so you always know exactly where your money stands.
hero.microtrust: No credit card required · Free plan forever

trust.title: Built for the people who run lean

features.title: The money side of your business, finally organized
features.subtitle: Clients, transactions, and quotations working together — with a live dashboard that turns activity into answers.

items.title: Every client in one place
items.desc: Track status, history, and the full money trail for each client. Soft-delete and restore so nothing is ever lost by accident.

items.title: Money in, money out
items.desc: Log incoming and outgoing transactions with categories, dates, and attachments. Watch net profit update instantly.

items.title: Quote, send, convert
items.desc: Build professional quotations, mark them sent or accepted, and convert a winning quote into a client in one click.

items.title: Built for any currency
items.desc: Set your currency per workspace. Amounts, charts, and totals are formatted the way your business reads them.

items.title: Bring your whole team
items.desc: Create organizations, invite members, and control access with owner, admin, editor, and viewer roles.

items.title: Clarity at a glance
items.desc: A live dashboard turns your transactions into trends, so cash flow and profit are obvious — not buried in spreadsheets.

items.title: Keep the paper trail
items.desc: Attach receipts and documents to transactions and quotations, stored safely alongside each record.

items.title: Speaks your language
items.desc: ProfitSync ships in 8 languages with full right-to-left support, so your whole team feels at home.

how.title: From signup to clarity in four steps
how.subtitle: No onboarding calls, no spreadsheets to migrate. Start tracking in minutes.

steps.title: Create your workspace
steps.desc: Sign up free and get a personal workspace in seconds. No credit card required.

steps.title: Add clients & log money
steps.desc: Bring in your clients and record incoming and outgoing transactions as they happen.

steps.title: Send quotations
steps.desc: Draft and send quotations, then convert the ones that land into active clients.

steps.title: Watch your profit sync
steps.desc: Your dashboard updates in real time, so you always know exactly where you stand.

value.title: Everything you need to run the money side of your business
value.subtitle: Thoughtfully built, privacy-first, and ready on day one.

items.title: Free plan, forever
items.desc: Start with a genuinely useful free tier. Upgrade only when you grow.

items.title: Private by design
items.desc: Your records are scoped to your workspace and never shared or sold.

items.title: Multi-currency ready
items.desc: Run your numbers in the currency your business actually uses.

items.title: Made for teams
items.desc: Invite your team with clear, role-based access from day one.

pricing.title: Simple pricing that scales with you
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you grow. Prices are shown in your local currency where available.
pricing.loadError: We couldn't load live pricing right now.
pricing.note: Localized currency and tax are handled at checkout by our payment provider. Cancel anytime.
pricing.freeBlurb: Everything you need to start tracking your business.
pricing.premiumBlurb: Higher limits and room to grow for serious businesses.

testimonials.title: Clarity people can feel
testimonials.subtitle: What changes when your numbers finally live in one place.

items.quote: I finally know my real profit each month instead of guessing. Logging a transaction takes seconds.
items.name: Maya R.

items.quote: We moved our whole studio off spreadsheets. Quotations that convert straight into clients saved us hours.
items.name: Daniel K.

items.quote: Multi-currency and roles meant my remote team was set up in an afternoon.
items.name: Priya S.

faq.title: Questions, answered
faq.subtitle: Everything you might want to know before you start.

items.a: Yes. The free plan is free forever with generous limits. Upgrade to Premium any time for higher limits and more room to grow.
Set any currency per workspace. Amounts, charts, and totals format to match the way your business reads its numbers.
Your records are scoped to your workspace and never shared. You can soft-delete records and permanently purge them whenever you want.
Absolutely. Create an organization and invite members with owner, admin, editor, or viewer roles.
Premium is billed securely through our payment provider, with localized pricing and tax handled at checkout. You can cancel anytime.
English, Italian, German, Hindi, Malayalam, Tamil, Telugu, and Arabic — including full right-to-left support.

cta.title: Start running your business by the numbers
cta.subtitle: Create your free workspace today — no credit card, no setup, just clarity.

blog.metaDescription: Guides, tips and stories on running the money side of your business — cash flow, clients, quotations, and growing as a freelancer or small team.
blog.title: Insights for running a leaner business
blog.subtitle: Practical guides on cash flow, clients, quotations and the money side of independent work.
blog.landingSubtitle: Practical guides on cash flow, clients and growing your business.

footer.tagline: The clean, fast way to track clients, cash flow, and quotations — and always know your profit.
